steps.title: Map definition, benefits, example
steps.content: The passage identifies community science as collaboration between professional scientists and amateur enthusiasts. It then lists benefits of that approach and finishes by mentioning a butterfly study that depended on it.

steps.title: Reject missing passage moves
steps.content: Choice A mentions public opinion, which the passage does not discuss. Choice B makes the butterfly study the main topic. Choice C invents development history and future projects. The definition, benefits, and study example sequence fits. The answer is D.
